ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: PRI LOAN-SEE GENERAL EXPLANATION FOR PURPOSE & ADDTL DETAILS RE AMT EXPENDED & LACK OF DIVERSION
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: THE GRANTOR HAS NO REASON TO DOUBT THE ACCURACY OR RELIABILITY OF THE REPORT FROM THE GRANTEE; THEREFORE, NO INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION OF THE REPORTS WERE MADE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.IdentifierTxt: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: PRI RECIPIENT: SELF HELP CREDIT UNION DATE OF PRI: 08/26/2019 PURPOSE OF PRI: TO PROVIDE FINANCING TO HIGH-PERFORMING PUBLIC CHARTER SCHOOLS FOR THE PURPOSES OF PURCHASING, DEVELOPING, OR RENOVATING EDUCATIONAL FACILITIES, WITH AN EMPHASIS ON FINANCING SCHOOLS SERVING PREDOMINANTLY DISADVANTAGED AND LOW-INCOME STUDENTS AND COMMUNITIES. REPORTS OF AMOUNTS EXPENDED: SELF HELP CREDIT UNION SUBMITTED A FULL AND COMPLETE FINANCIAL REPORT OF THE TYPE ORDINARILY REQUIRED BY COMMERCIAL INVESTORS UNDER SIMILAR CIRCUMSTANCES AND A STATEMENT THAT IT HAS COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE INVESTMENT FOR ITS FISCAL YEARS INDICATED BELOW: DATE OF REPORT: 06/26/2020 FOR FYE 12/31/2019 DATE OF REPORT: 12/28/2021 FOR PERIOD 1/1/2020-10/15/2020 THIS INVESTMENT WAS REMOVED FROM THE FOUNDATION'S BOOKS ON 10/15/2020, THE DATE SELF HELP CREDIT UNION PAID BACK THIS LOAN. DIVERSIONS: TO THE KNOWLEDGE OF THE GRANTOR, NO FUNDS HAVE BEEN DIVERTED TO ANY ACTIVITY OTHER THAN THE ACTIVITY FOR WHICH THE INVESTMENT WAS ORIGINALLY MADE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.IdentifierTxt: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: PRI RECIPIENT: SELF HELP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION DATE OF PRI: 08/22/2019 PURPOSE OF PRI: TO PROVIDE HOME AND COMMERCIAL LOANS TO LOW INCOME BORROWERS OF COLOR IN THE CHICAGO AREA. REPORTS OF AMOUNTS EXPENDED: SELF HELP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SUBMITTED A FULL AND COMPLETE FINANCIAL REPORT OF THE TYPE ORDINARILY REQUIRED BY COMMERCIAL INVESTORS UNDER SIMILAR CIRCUMSTANCES AND A STATEMENT THAT IT HAS COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE INVESTMENT FOR ITS FISCAL YEARS INDICATED BELOW: DATE OF REPORT: 06/26/2020 FOR FYE 12/31/2019 DATE OF REPORT: 12/28/2021 FOR PERIOD 1/1/2020-09/29/2020 THIS INVESTMENT WAS REMOVED FROM THE FOUNDATION'S BOOKS ON 09/29/2020, THE DATE SELF HELP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION PAID BACK THIS LOAN. DIVERSIONS: TO THE KNOWLEDGE OF THE GRANTOR, NO FUNDS HAVE BEEN DIVERTED TO ANY ACTIVITY OTHER THAN THE ACTIVITY FOR WHICH THE INVESTMENT WAS ORIGINALLY MADE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.IdentifierTxt: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: PRI RECIPIENT: SELF HELP CREDIT UNION DATE OF PRI: 8/25/2020 AMOUNT OF PRI: $281,000 PURPOSE OF PRI: TO PROVIDE FINANCING TO HIGH-PERFORMING PUBLIC CHARTER SCHOOLS FOR THE PURPOSES OF PURCHASING, DEVELOPING, OR RENOVATING EDUCATIONAL FACILITIES, WITH AN EMPHASIS ON FINANCING SCHOOLS SERVING PREDOMINANTLY DISADVANTAGED AND LOW-INCOME STUDENTS AND COMMUNITIES. REPORTS OF AMOUNT EXPENDED: SELF HELP CREDIT UNION SUBMITTED A FULL AND COMPLETE FINANCIAL REPORT OF THE TYPE ORDINARILY REQUIRED BY COMMERCIAL INVESTORS UNDER SIMILAR CIRCUMSTANCES AND A STATEMENT THAT IT HAS COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE INVESTMENT FOR ITS FISCAL YEARS INDICATED BELOW: DATE OF REPORT: 08/06/2021 FOR FYE 12/31/2020 DATE OF REPORT: 1/12/2023 FOR PERIOD 1/1/2021-10/6/2021 THIS INVESTMENT WAS REMOVED FROM THE FOUNDATION'S BOOKS ON 10/06/2021, THE DATE SELF HELP CREDIT UNION PAID BACK THIS LOAN. DIVERSIONS: TO THE KNOWLEDGE OF THE GRANTOR, NO FUNDS HAVE BEEN DIVERTED TO ANY ACTIVITY OTHER THAN THE ACTIVITY FOR WHICH THE INVESTMENT WAS ORIGINALLY MADE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.IdentifierTxt: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: PRI RECIPIENT: SELF HELP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION DATE OF PRI: 8/25/2020 AMOUNT OF PRI: $250,000 PURPOSE OF PRI: TO PROVIDE HOME AND COMMERCIAL LOANS TO LOW INCOME BORROWERS OF COLOR IN THE CHICAGO AREA. REPORTS OF AMOUNT EXPENDED: SELF HELP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SUBMITTED A FULL AND COMPLETE FINANCIAL REPORT OF THE TYPE ORDINARILY REQUIRED BY COMMERCIAL INVESTORS UNDER SIMILAR CIRCUMSTANCES AND A STATEMENT THAT IT HAS COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE INVESTMENT FOR ITS FISCAL YEARS INDICATED BELOW: DATE OF REPORT: 08/06/2021 FOR FYE 12/31/2020 DATE OF REPORT: 1/12/2023 FOR PERIOD 1/1/2021-10/1/2021 THIS INVESTMENT WAS REMOVED FROM THE FOUNDATION'S BOOKS OF 10/1/2021, THE DATE SELF HELP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION PAID BACK THIS LOAN. DIVERSIONS: TO THE KNOWLEDGE OF THE GRANTOR, NO FUNDS HAVE BEEN DIVERTED TO ANY ACTIVITY OTHER THAN THE ACTIVITY FOR WHICH THE INVESTMENT WAS ORIGINALLY MADE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: PRI RECIPIENT: SELF HELP CREDIT UNION DATE OF PRI: 8/20/2021 AMOUNT OF PRI: $240,000 PURPOSE OF PRI: TO PROVIDE FINANCING TO HIGH-PERFORMING PUBLIC CHARTER SCHOOLS FOR THE PURPOSES OF PURCHASING, DEVELOPING, OR RENOVATING EDUCATIONAL FACILITIES, WITH AN EMPHASIS ON FINANCING SCHOOLS SERVING PREDOMINANTLY DISADVANTAGED AND LOW-INCOME STUDENTS AND COMMUNITIES. REPORTS OF AMOUNT EXPENDED: SELF HELP CREDIT UNION SUBMITTED A FULL AND COMPLETE FINANCIAL REPORT OF THE TYPE ORDINARILY REQUIRED BY COMMERCIAL INVESTORS UNDER SIMILAR CIRCUMSTANCES AND A STATEMENT THAT IT HAS COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE INVESTMENT FOR ITS FISCAL YEAR INDICATED BELOW: DATE OF REPORT: 1/12/2023 FOR FYE 12/31/2021 THIS INVESTMENT REMAINED ON THE FOUNDATION'S BOOKS AS OF 08/31/2022. DIVERSIONS: TO THE KNOWLEDGE OF THE GRANTOR, NO FUNDS HAVE BEEN DIVERTED TO ANY ACTIVITY OTHER THAN THE ACTIVITY FOR WHICH THE INVESTMENT WAS ORIGINALLY MADE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.IdentifierTxt: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: PRI RECIPIENT: SELF HELP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION DATE OF PRI: 8/20/2021 AMOUNT OF PRI: $220,000 PURPOSE OF PRI: TO PROVIDE HOME AND COMMERCIAL LOANS TO LOW-INCOME BORROWERS OF COLOR IN THE CHICAGO AREA. REPORTS OF AMOUNT EXPENDED: SELF HELP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SUBMITTED A FULL AND COMPLETE FINANCIAL REPORT OF THE TYPE ORDINARILY REQUIRED BY COMMERCIAL INVESTORS UNDER SIMILAR CIRCUMSTANCES AND A STATEMENT THAT IT HAS COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE INVESTMENT FOR ITS FISCAL YEAR INDICATED BELOW: DATE OF REPORT: 1/12/2023 FOR FYE 12/31/2021 THIS INVESTMENT REMAINED ON THE FOUNDATION'S BOOKS AS OF 08/31/2022. GeneralExplanationGrp.IdentifierTxt: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990-PF, PART VI-B, LINE 5D - EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: PRI RECIPIENT: SELF HELP CREDIT UNION DATE OF PRI: 08/23/2022 PURPOSE OF PRI: TO PROVIDE HOME AND COMMERCIAL LOANS TO LOW-INCOME BORROWERS OF COLOR IN NORTH CAROLINA. REPORTS OF AMOUNTS EXPENDED: SELF HELP CREDIT UNION IS EXPECTED TO SUBMIT A FULL AND COMPLETE FINANCIAL REPORT OF THE TYPE ORDINARILY REQUIRED BY COMMERCIAL INVESTORS UNDER SIMILAR CIRCUMSTANCES AND A STATEMENT THAT IT HAS COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE INVESTMENT IN 2023. THIS INVESTMENT REMAINED ON THE FOUNDATION'S BOOKS AS OF 08/31/2022. DIVERSIONS: TO THE KNOWLEDGE OF THE GRANTOR, NO FUNDS HAVE BEEN DIVERTED TO ANY ACTIVITY OTHER THAN THE ACTIVITY FOR WHICH THE INVESTMENT WAS ORIGINALLY MADE.
